import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class Forecaster(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_len=96, num_features=7, pred_len=720, kernel_size=25):
        super().__init__()
        self.input_len = input_len
        self.num_features = num_features
        self.pred_len = pred_len
        self.kernel_size = kernel_size
        self.linear_seasonal = nn.Linear(input_len, pred_len)
        self.linear_trend = nn.Linear(input_len, pred_len)

    def forward(self, x):
        # x: (batch, seq_len, features)
        x = x.transpose(1, 2)  # (batch, features, seq_len)
        trend = self.moving_avg(x)
        seasonal = x - trend
        seasonal_output = self.linear_seasonal(seasonal)
        trend_output = self.linear_trend(trend)
        output = seasonal_output + trend_output
        output = output.transpose(1, 2)  # (batch, pred_len, features)
        return output

    def moving_avg(self, x):
        # x: (batch, features, seq_len)
        kernel_size = self.kernel_size
        padding = (kernel_size - 1) // 2
        x_padded = F.pad(x, (padding, padding), mode='replicate')
        avg = F.avg_pool1d(x_padded, kernel_size, stride=1)
        return avg[:, :, :x.shape[2]]
